nodes.title: Display Journal Entries
nodes.description: When /biz/:bizId/journal page loads, fetch GET /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries and display in table with columns: entry number, date, description, total debit, total credit, balanced status. Supports date range filtering.

nodes.title: Open Journal Entry Form
nodes.description: When user clicks 'إضافة قيد' button, display form with: date picker, description input, operationTypeId dropdown (required), category dropdown, and dynamic lines table with columns [account, debit, credit, description]. Shows running totals for debit and credit.

nodes.title: Submit Journal Entry
nodes.description: When user clicks 'حفظ' on journal entry form, triggers POST /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries with form data. Success: closes form, shows success toast, refreshes list. Failure: shows error from API (e.g., 'معرّف نوع العملية (القالب) مطلوب').

nodes.title: Delete Journal Entry
nodes.description: When user clicks delete icon on entry row, shows confirmation dialog. On confirm, triggers DELETE /api/businesses/:bizId/journal-entries/:id. Success: removes from list, shows toast.
